scripts.predev: if [ -d /vercel/share/v0-project/src ]; then echo '[predev] v0: installing in project dir...' && npm install --prefix /vercel/share/v0-project && echo '[predev] done'; fi
scripts.dev: if [ -d /vercel/share/v0-project/src ]; then cd /vercel/share/v0-project && exec ./node_modules/.bin/next dev; else next dev; fi
